title: Check visa application processing times :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Check visa application processing times
Use our processing time tool to find out how long a visa application may take to be processed.

## How to check processing times
To use our processing time tool, select the visa you applied for and the date you applied. Then select the 'Check processing times' button.
If you have not applied yet, select the visa you want to apply for and when you want to apply. You can select a date up to 2 weeks in the future.

### What the results show
You will see a timeline that shows:
- the date you applied, or intend to apply on
- the date when 50% of applications will be processed
- the date when 80% of applications will be processed, and
- today’s date, so you can see where you are in relation to the processing timeframes.
Both the 50% and the 80% figures are calculated using working days. ‘Working days’ excludes Saturdays, Sundays and public holidays.

### This timeframe is only a guide
It is based on current application processing timeframes. It may change when we update the processing times.
In some situations, your application may take longer than the estimated time. For example, if we have to contact you to ask for more information. Find out about how to check the status of your application:
Checking your visa application status
This tool does not currently have all visa processing times available. If your visa or application type is not available, you can check how long your application may take:
Fees, decision times and where to apply

## Use our processing time tool
